summary: ANDROID | FMD - When app open for first time dialog for 'Data collection' is constantly appearing after clicking on device card
scenario: First-time app launch with location denied causes 'Data collection' dialog to repeatedly reappear when tapping a device card
description_clean: When the app is opened for the first time, the 'Data collection' dialog keeps appearing repeatedly after clicking on a device card. Steps: 1) Start app with connected device. 2) During onboarding, select "Don't Allow" for location. 3) Go to FMD screen and click OK. 4) Dismiss second dialog by tapping outside. 5) Click on device card without exiting screen — dialog pops up constantly. Expected: Dialog is dismissed and device card is shown.
steps: During onboarding, select "Don't Allow" for location.
Go to FMD screen and click OK.
Dismiss second dialog by tapping outside.
Click on device card without exiting screen.
expected: Dialog is dismissed and device card is shown.
actual: The 'Data collection' dialog keeps appearing repeatedly after clicking on a device card.
